mapper.select: SELECT t.*, s.username as seller_username, b.username as buyer_username, p.product_name, p.category FROM trades t LEFT JOIN users s ON t.seller_student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN users b ON t.buyer_student_id = b.student_id LEFT JOIN products p ON t.product_id = p.product_id WHERE t.trade_id = #{tradeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trades (trade_id, seller_student_id, buyer_student_id, product_id, trade_price, trade_status) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{sellerStudentId}, #{buyerStudentId}, #{productId}, #{tradePrice}, #{tradeStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE trades SET trade_status = #{status} WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId}
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, s.username as seller_username, b.username as buyer_username, p.product_name, p.category FROM trades t LEFT JOIN users s ON t.seller_student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN users b ON t.buyer_student_id = b.student_id LEFT JOIN products p ON t.product_id = p.product_id WHERE t.seller_student_id = #{studentId} OR t.buyer_student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY t.trade_date DESC

SELECT t.*, s.username as seller_username, b.username as buyer_username, p.product_name, p.category FROM trades t LEFT JOIN users s ON t.seller_student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN users b ON t.buyer_student_id = b.student_id LEFT JOIN products p ON t.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY t.trade_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trades WHERE trade_status = '已完成' AND trade_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
